subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: This is our last day and my last meeting with you. In a few minutes our steamer will leave these shores
subcodes.first_line_orig: این روز آخر و ملاقات آخری است حالا دیگر سوار واپور شده
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @call to action, @love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @war and peace, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction
